use_cases: Displaying navigation shortcuts and quick actions in SaaS dashboards
Providing featured action buttons in e-commerce product pages
Serving as an admin panel utility component for common operations
Enabling user profile or settings quick-access menus
Acting as a reusable widget for launching various application features
ai_summary: A reusable quick links card component built on shadcn/ui that displays action buttons in a responsive 3-column grid layout. Features smooth Framer Motion animations with hover scale and tap press feedback for interactive buttons. Theme-adaptive design using CSS variables, making it suitable for various SaaS applications, admin dashboards, and e-commerce platforms requiring quick action navigation.
